title: Crunchy Peppy Bean Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic Turkish dish featuring green beans that are boiled, stir-fried with a touch of heat for a crunchy texture and peppery flavor, suitable for halal.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Include finely chopped onion and red chili pepper; cook for another minute.
Toss in the washed green beans and stir-fry them thoroughly.
Sprinkle with salt to taste and serve hot.
Optional: Serve with a side of rice or naan bread.
